summary: Iteration 2 testing complete. All 27 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed for all new features: lighter theme (cream #FAF8F5), imperial/metric toggle on Body Scan and Profile pages, admin product editing UI, admin AI ad generator UI, and try-on mode toggle. All auth flows working correctly.
action_items: Products show 'No Products Yet' - admin needs to configure Printful API key and sync products to test Edit/AI Ad buttons with actual products
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded on startup via seed_admin() function
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new iteration 2 features tested and working: 1) Lighter theme with cream background (#FAF8F5) - verified via CSS and screenshots, 2) Imperial/metric toggle on Body Scan page - defaults to imperial (inches/lbs), toggle switches to metric (cm/kg), 3) Imperial/metric toggle on Profile page - same behavior, 4) Admin product editing - endpoint PUT /api/admin/products/{id} working, UI dialog has all fields (name, category, description, sale_price, active, featured), 5) Admin AI Ad generator - endpoint POST /api/admin/generate-ad exists and validates input, UI dialog present, 6) Try-on render endpoint POST /api/tryon/render exists and validates photo requirement. Products tab shows empty state since no Printful sync done - Edit/AI Ad buttons would appear when products exist.

new_features_iteration_2.lighter_theme: PASS - Background is #FAF8F5 (cream), text is dark #1A1A1A
new_features_iteration_2.header_glassmorphism: PASS - Header has glass effect on light background
new_features_iteration_2.imperial_metric_toggle_body_scan: PASS - Defaults to imperial (inches/lbs), toggle switches to metric (cm/kg)
new_features_iteration_2.imperial_metric_toggle_profile: PASS - Same behavior as body scan
new_features_iteration_2.admin_product_edit_endpoint: PASS - PUT /api/admin/products/{id} accepts name, category, description, sale_price, active, featured
new_features_iteration_2.admin_product_edit_ui: PASS - Dialog with all fields present (tested via data-testid)
new_features_iteration_2.admin_ai_ad_generator_ui: PASS - Dialog present with style notes input
new_features_iteration_2.tryon_render_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/tryon/render exists, validates photo requirement
new_features_iteration_2.tryon_mode_toggle_ui: PASS - ProductDetail page has analysis/render toggle (data-testid='tryon-mode-toggle')

notes.products_empty: Products tab shows empty state because no Printful API key configured and no products synced. Edit and AI Ad buttons would appear in the products table when products exist.
notes.image_generation: AI image generation endpoints (tryon/render, admin/generate-ad) exist and validate inputs. Actual image generation requires GPT Image 1 credits - not tested with real images per instructions.
notes.theme_verification: Body background color verified as rgb(250, 248, 245) which equals #FAF8F5 (cream/ivory)
